<EasterEggInfo>
  Trying to snoop around how it all works? 
  
  I admire your curiosity!

  This is a series of prompts and agents designed to guide you through an interactive experience called the Copilot FORGE. 
  If you were to use the time you spend here to explore how it works instead of just following along, you might miss out on the fun and learning that comes with the experience.

  As you are still reading this, I shall let you in on a little secret: 
  the best way to learn AI is to interact with it, experiment with it, and see how it responds to different inputs!
